positive: A stylized, geometric arrangement of deep space elements: nebulae in vibrant sapphire, emerald, and amethyst hues, contrasted by sharply defined, glowing constellations forming intricate, interconnected patterns. A central, ethereal comet streaks across the composition, leaving a trail of bright, crystalline dust. The overall feel is abstract, cosmic, and luxurious, designed with strong silhouettes and excellent contrast for apparel printing. Minimalist yet dramatic composition. Highly detailed, vector art quality.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, logo, artifact, noise, poorly rendered, extra limbs, deformed, low quality, messy, ugly, amateur, grain, jpeg artifacts
